events.speaker: Person 1
events.text: If we pitch this as a team memory product, pricing has to feel founder-friendly first.
Positioning: physical context layer for small teams, not generic meeting recorder.

events.speaker: Person 2
events.text: I like $99 a month for the founder plan, but enterprise buyers will ask how we handle trust and retention.
Enterprise trust, retention controls, and privacy posture need clear answers.
Visible notes: $99/mo founder plan, enterprise trust risk, demo Friday.

payload.text: Team agreed to test a $99/mo founder plan first.
Enterprise buyers may require stronger trust, privacy, and retention controls.
Whiteboard captured demo Friday, $99/mo founder plan, and enterprise trust risk.

events.text: For the investor meeting: the team chose to test a $99/mo founder plan because the first wedge is small teams that need physical-room memory. The unresolved risk is enterprise trust: retention, privacy posture, and buyer confidence need crisp answers. The whiteboard also flagged demo Friday as the next proof point.
